legal.draftNotice: This page is still being drafted before launch.
legal.privacyBody: We collect only what's needed to render your public card — your handle, the profile fields you enter, and (for paid plans) the customer ID Stripe returns to us. We don't run ads, sell data, or load tracking pixels.
legal.termsBody: Don't impersonate other people, don't post anything illegal, and don't try to break the service. We can take down handles that violate this. Subscriptions can be canceled any time from /settings.
legal.contactPrompt: Questions in the meantime? Reach out and we'll update this page with whatever's still unclear.

footer.tagline: The bio link for people who don't live in one place.
footer.credit: Made for nomads, by people who keep moving.

metadata.title: Nomad.now — One page for your nomad life
metadata.description: Where you are. Where you've been. What you're building. One link.
metadata.ogDescription: Where you are. Where you've been. What you're building.
metadata.pricingDescription: Straightforward pricing for your nomad card. Two plans, no free tier, no ads, no transaction fees.

home.heroSub: One link for your whole nomad life — live local time, every country you've stayed in, what you're working on. At <handle>nomad.now/yourhandle</handle>.

live.title: Time on your card moves with you.
live.description: These are real times in those cities. They'll tick every minute on someone's actual card.

feature1.label: Travel
feature1.title: The map that grows with you.
feature1.body: Not a row of flag emojis. A real constellation — visible at a glance, sharable as an image, and yours forever as you keep moving.

feature2.label: Time
feature2.title: Wherever you are, your clock follows.
feature2.body: Your local time refreshes every minute on your card. Collaborators on the other side of the world stop wondering when you're reachable.

feature3.label: Status
feature3.title: Tell people what you're up to.
feature3.body: Pick a preset like freelancing or full-time, or write your own. Visible above the fold, never out of date.

feature4.label: Get hired
feature4.title: Land work while you travel.
feature4.body: A solid "Hire me" button and a softer "Grab a coffee" pair, right under your name. Most freelancers' link-in-bio is a landing page in disguise — your card just says so out loud.
feature4.caption: Pair the primary hire path with a peer-meetup CTA. Either, both, or neither.

comparison.title: Why not just Linktree?
comparison.subtitle: Because you don't live in one place.
comparison.footnote: Linktree raised prices 67% in late 2025. We won't.

darkCta.body: Set it up in a minute. Carry it forever.

pricing.headline: Two plans. No ads. No fees.
pricing.subhead: We don't offer a free tier — it's how we keep the platform clean, ad-free, and built for nomads instead of advertisers.

almostThere.title: <mono>nomad.now/{handle}</mono> is reserved for you.
almostThere.subtitle: Pick a plan below to publish your card.

basic.label: Basic
basic.tagline: Get on the map. Everything you need for a public nomad card.

pro.label: Pro
pro.tagline: Own your nomad brand. Custom domain, verified badge, advanced analytics.

pricing.footnote: Prices in USD. Cancel any time — your card stays live to the end of the current period.

basicBullets.stays: City stays timeline with photos (up to 6 per stay)
basicBullets.links: Unlimited brand-icon links + YouTube / Spotify / Vimeo embeds
basicBullets.themes: 7 themes + button shape, background, and font customization
basicBullets.travelStats: Travel stats — countries · cities · days on the road

proBullets.handles: Up to 5 handles on one account

noFree.q: Why is there no free plan?
noFree.a: A free plan would force us to put ads or transaction fees somewhere — neither feels right for a profile you'd share to your network. $1.98 keeps the lights on without compromising the product.

cancel.a: Yes. Your card stays live until the end of the current billing period. After that the page returns a 'no longer available' notice — your handle is held for 30 days in case you change your mind.

data.q: What happens to my data if I cancel?
data.a: Export everything (profile, links, visited countries) as JSON from settings before cancelling. We keep your data for 90 days after cancellation in case you resubscribe.

switch.q: Can I switch between Basic and Pro?
switch.a: Upgrade anytime — billed prorated. Downgrade takes effect at the end of the current period.

fees.a: No. We don't sell digital products on your behalf, so there's nothing to take a cut from. The card is your card.

finalCta.title: Create your username.
finalCta.body: nomad.now/<handle>yourname</handle> — pick one before someone else does.

login.title: Sign in.
login.subtitle: No password needed — pick how you'd like to sign in.
login.googleError: Could not sign in with Google. Please try again.
login.sentBody: We sent a sign-in link to <highlight>{email}</highlight>. Click it to continue.
login.errorGeneric: Could not send the magic link. Please try again.

createCard.title: Claim your card.
createCard.subtitle: Just two — handle and name. Everything else is optional, edit anytime.
createCard.editSubtitle: Update what's shown on your public profile.
createCard.handleLocked: Handle is locked. To change it, contact support.
createCard.handleAvailable: Available — claim it before someone else does
createCard.name: Name
createCard.currentCityHint: Shown live on your card. Change when you move.
createCard.timezoneHint: Drives the live clock on your card. Auto-detected from your browser — change if you want your card to show a different one.

avatar.label: Avatar
avatar.hint: JPG, PNG, WebP, or GIF · max 5 MB
avatar.badType: Unsupported file type — use JPG, PNG, WebP, or GIF

hireCta.title: Hire CTA
hireCta.description: A prominent button visitors can tap to reach you — for booking, intro calls, or hire-me inquiries.
hireCta.urlHint: Email (mailto:…), phone (tel:…), or any https:// link.

meetupCta.title: Meetup CTA
meetupCta.description: A secondary button for local meetups — coffee, casual hi, peer chats. Pairs with Hire CTA as the social side of your card.
meetupCta.urlHint: Calendar link works best. Email (mailto:…) and Telegram (tg://…) also accepted.

openToCoffee.label: I'm open to coffee with strangers
openToCoffee.hintWithCity: A ☕️ chip on your card will say “Open to coffee in {city}”. Soft signal — visitors can reach out via your links or Meetup CTA.
openToCoffee.hintNoCity: Add a current city above to make this show on your card.
openToCoffee.warningNoCity: Current city is empty — this won't show on your card until you add one above.

blurbs.title: Blurbs
blurbs.description: Short label/value pairs shown next to your bio — Now reading, Booking, Rate, Tools, anything that gives a flavour of how you work.

featuredWork.title: Featured work
featuredWork.description: Up to 6 clickable project tiles — case studies, portfolio pieces, recent client work. Each tile shows a title, optional one-line description, and links out.
featuredWork.descPlaceholder: One-line description (optional) — what you did and the outcome.

createCard.visitedCountriesHint: Tap the flags of countries you've visited — lights up the map on your card.
createCard.nomadSinceHint: One month picker — drives the “X years on the road” stat. Skip if you'd rather log individual stays below.
createCard.submitNote: From $1.98 / month. Cancel any time — your card stays live to the end of the period.

settings.title: Settings.
settings.subtitle: Customize your profile layout, theme, and what's shown.

preview.title: Live preview
preview.noCard: You haven't created your card yet.

layout.title: Layout
layout.description: Choose how your profile is arranged.

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: A complete look — background, type, buttons, accent.

accent.title: Accent color
accent.description: Repaints link buttons, the Hire / Meetup CTAs, brand-icon tints, and the map's city dots. Pick any color or fall back to the theme's default.
accent.proLockHint: Custom accent is a Pro feature — your card uses the theme's default color.

overrides.title: Theme details
overrides.description: Mix-and-match the small touches independently from the theme — pick a decoration from one preset, an avatar style from another.

buttonShape.title: Button shape
buttonShape.description: Corner style for link rows. Works with any theme.

linksLayout.title: Links layout
linksLayout.description: Full-width labelled rows, or a compact icon strip. Custom links and embeds always stay as rows.

background.title: Background
background.description: Override the theme background with a solid color or gradient.

font.title: Font
font.description: Each option renders in its own font — pick what fits your tone.

sections.title: Section order
sections.description: Rearrange how blocks appear on your card. Empty blocks auto-hide.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: Who can see what, and with how much delay.
privacy.delayHint: Lag data behind real time for privacy. 0 = immediate.

billing.title: Billing
billing.description: Manage your subscription, update your card, or cancel.
billing.portalError: Could not open the billing portal. Please try again.

celebrate.title: Your card is live!
celebrate.subtitle: Share it with your network — every share brings someone new.
celebrate.tweetTemplate: Just made my nomad card on @nomadnow — check it out: {url}

stays.editorHint: Cities you've nomadded in. Day counts compute automatically.
stays.collapsedHint: Log specific cities — only if you want city pins on the map or want people to know where you'd grab a coffee.
stays.emptyHint: No stays yet — add your first one below.
stays.photoEmptyHint: Add photos from this stay (up to 6, optional).
stays.photoError: Couldn't upload — try a smaller image.

explore.metaDescription: See where digital nomads are right now, what they're building, and where they've been.
explore.metaOgDescription: See where digital nomads are right now.
explore.title: Explore nomads.
explore.subtitle: Where they are. Where they've been. What they're building.
explore.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, handle, bio, or city…
explore.emptyDescription: Be the first to claim a card and show up on the map.

map.metaTitle: The nomad map — where everyone's been
map.metaDescription: See every country digital nomads on Nomad.now have set foot in, ranked by how active each one is. A live constellation of remote work.
map.metaOgDescription: See every country digital nomads have visited. A live constellation of remote work.
map.title: Every country everyone's been to.
map.subtitle: A live constellation of where the platform's nomads have set foot. Bigger dot = more people. Click a country to see who's been there.
map.emptyTitle: No nomads on the map yet
map.emptyDescription: Be the first to claim a card and put a country on the board.
map.ctaTitle: Put your countries on the map.
map.ctaBody: Pick the ones you've been to. They appear here, on your card, and on your share image.

inCountry.metaDescription: Digital nomads who have set foot in {country} {flag}. See where remote workers travel, what they do, and where they're going next.
inCountry.metaOgDescription: Digital nomads who have set foot in {country}.
inCountry.title: Nomads in <gray>{country}</gray>.
inCountry.subtitleEmpty: Nobody's claimed a card here yet. Be the first.
inCountry.emptyBody: Add {country} to your visited countries and you'll show up here for everyone searching for "{country}".

profileExpired.title: This card is no longer available.
profileExpired.body: The owner's subscription ended. The handle is held for 30 days in case they come back.

profileNotFound.availableBody: Nobody's claimed this handle yet. Take it before someone else does.
profileNotFound.availableNote: From $1.98 / month · 1 minute to set up
profileNotFound.reservedBody: This handle is reserved — usually because it collides with a system page or a brand-protected name.
profileNotFound.invalidBody: Handles use letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores only — between 1 and 50 characters.
profileNotFound.footer: © 2026 Nomad.now · The bio link for people who don't live in one place.
